# Causal Diagrams and Structural Causal Models

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Causal directed acyclic graphs

_To be added._

## Applications of causal DAGs

_To be added._

## The back-door criterion and d-separation

_To be added._

## The front-door criterion

_To be added._

## Structural causal models

_To be added._

## A taxonomy of biases

_To be added._
